eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Churchill; Clark; Douglas; Elko; Esmeralda; Eureka; Humboldt; Lander; Lincoln; Lyon; Mineral; Nye; Pershing; Storey; Washoe; White Pine; Carson City, NV; at 02:39 PM ON MAR 26, 2026 Effective until 03:39 PM. extra_text: THIS IS A TEST OF THE INTEGRATED PUBLIC ALERT AND WARNING SYSTEM.  This is only a test.  No action is required
